schema.title: Response Ping Api V1 Auth Ping Get

post.description: Authenticate a user with email and password. Returns an access token in the response body and sets a httpOnly refresh token cookie.
Invalidates the refresh token stored in the httpOnly cookie and clears it. Returns 204 No Content regardless of whether the cookie was present.
Rotates the refresh token: invalidates the current one, issues a new refresh token (set as httpOnly cookie) and returns a new access token in the response body. Requires a valid refresh token cookie.

401.description: Refresh token is missing, invalid or expired

post.description: Change password for the authenticated user after old password verification.

get.description: Returns up to 3 unique decks with the latest user study activity. Decks are sorted by the most recent review timestamp in descending order.

Retrieve detailed information about a specific deck belonging to the current user.

        The deck is identified by its unique ID.  
        Access is allowed only if the deck belongs to the authenticated user 
        or if the deck is public.

patch.description:
Partially updates a specific deck belonging to the current user.

        Only the fields provided in the request body will be updated. 
        Fields that are not included will remain unchanged.

        The deck must belong to the authenticated user, otherwise access will be denied.

delete.description:
Partially updates a specific deck belonging to the current user.

        Only the fields provided in the request body will be updated. 
        Fields that are not included will remain unchanged.

        The deck must belong to the authenticated user, otherwise access will be denied.

get.description:
Retrieve a paginated list of decks created by the authenticated user.

        Supports pagination via query parameters (e.g. page, size).  
        Returns basic information about each deck along with pagination metadata.

post.description: Creates a new deck for the authenticated user. The deck name must not be empty or contain only whitespace. Returns the created deck object with its generated ID and metadata.

parameters.name: q

schema.description: Filter cards by term and definition (partial match)
schema.title: Q

parameters.description: Filter cards by term and definition (partial match)

get.summary: Get a file by its key
get.description: Retrieves a file by its storage key. The file key supports path separators (e.g. `IMAGE/uuid.jpeg`, `CARDS/SOUNDS/uuid.mpeg`). Returns raw file bytes with the original content type and filename preserved in the response headers.

patch.description:
Update the current user's profile fields.
        All fields are optional — only provided fields will be updated.
        - **username**: new display name
        - **bio**: short text about the user
        - **avatar**: image file (JPEG/PNG); replaces the existing avatar if present

get.description: Return the profile of the currently authenticated user.
takes out the most expired card from the users deck and builds a quiz question from it

patch.description: Giving the user's answer after we have received the answer in get-next-question

post.description:
Create new user feedback.

Args:
    request: Validated feedback data including message, type, and fill time.

Returns:
    Success confirmation with the created feedback ID.

Raises:
    401: If the user is not authenticated.

examples: The checkout process was seamless and fast!

form_filled_time_ms.title: Form Filled Time Ms
form_filled_time_ms.description: Time taken to fill the form in milliseconds. Must be greater than 1.

CreateFeedbackRequest.title: CreateFeedbackRequest
CreateFeedbackRequest.description:
Request DTO for creating new user feedback.

This model validates and structures incoming feedback data from clients,
ensuring the message length, feedback type, and timing information meet
the API's requirements.

Attributes:
    message: The textual content of the user's feedback. Maximum 550 characters.
    feedback_type: The category of feedback being submitted (bug, wish, or other).
    form_filled_time_ms: The time taken by the user to fill out the feedback form
        in milliseconds. Must be greater than 1.

Example:
    >>> request = CreateFeedbackRequest(
    ...     message="The checkout process was seamless and fast!",
    ...     feedback_type=FeedbackTypeDto.WISH,
    ...     form_filled_time_ms=1500
    ... )

FeedbackTypeDto.title: FeedbackTypeDto
FeedbackTypeDto.description:
Enumeration of supported feedback categories.

Attributes:
    BUG: Indicates a bug report or technical issue.
    WISH: Indicates a feature request or suggestion.
    OTHER: Indicates feedback that does not fall into the other categories.

AGAIN == Не знаю | Don't know: 1
HARD == Знаю с трудом | I hardly know: 2
GOOD == Знаю | I know.: 3

RatingRequest.title: RatingRequest
RatingRequest.description:
review_id: UUID: The uuid that was retrieved in /get-next-question
rating: Rating: The rating that was given during the answer
review_date_time: datetime: The date and time the rating was given. Must be in UTC.
review_duration: int: Time in which the user gave an answer in milliseconds
